printed.name: Triceps
printed.setup: Kneeling sideways on carriage, eyes looking toward hand on shoulder rest, legs shoulder width apart and parallel, one leg aligned with front edge of carriage, trunk in lateral flexion, bottom arm straight, hand on shoulder rest, top arm bent, elbow reaching to ceiling, hand in strap, palm facing up

movement.inhale: Bend arm, return to start position

cues: Keep pressing bottom hand into shoulder rest
Keep weight evenly distributed on both legs and pelvis level
